name: network-connectivity-center
title: GCP Transit — Network Connectivity Center
summary: Creates an NCC hub with VPC-network spokes (full-mesh inter-VPC reachability) and hybrid spokes (HA VPN tunnels / Interconnect VLAN attachments, optional branch-to-branch transfer over Google's backbone).

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory labels.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' label (lowercased).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' label (lowercased).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional labels merged beneath the mandatory label set (lowercased).

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: project_id
module.description: GCP project ID hosting the NCC hub.

module.name: vpc_spokes
module.description: VPC-network spokes keyed by logical name. Full-mesh subnet reachability between all VPC spokes on the hub.

module.name: hybrid_spokes
module.type: map(object({ location = string type = string uris = list(string) site_to_site_data_transfer = optional(bool, true) }))
module.description: Hybrid spokes (HA VPN tunnels or Interconnect VLAN attachments) keyed by logical name. site_to_site_data_transfer enables branch-to-branch through Google's backbone.

outputs.name: hub_id
outputs.description: ID of the Network Connectivity Center hub.

outputs.name: attachment_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical spoke name to spoke ID across VPC and hybrid spokes.

outputs.name: vpc_spoke_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical VPC spoke name to spoke ID.

outputs.name: hybrid_spoke_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical hybrid spoke name to spoke ID.
